steps.title: Read the contrast signal
steps.content: The phrase or, conversely sets up the opposite of historically significant. The blank therefore needs a word meaning relatively unimportant or lacking historical consequence.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: A means very important, so it repeats rather than contrasts with historically significant. C describes kindness or generosity, not historical importance. D means authentic or real, which does not fit the contrast. The answer is B.
